name: @remembrance/cursor-plugin
description: Cursor plugin for Remembrance MCP tools, always-on agent guidance, and contribution hooks.

scripts.build: node --check scripts/session-start.mjs && node --check scripts/record-task-eligibility.mjs && node --check scripts/record-mcp-use.mjs && node --check scripts/contribute-on-stop.mjs && node --check scripts/hook-core.mjs
scripts.typecheck: node --check scripts/session-start.mjs && node --check scripts/record-task-eligibility.mjs && node --check scripts/record-mcp-use.mjs && node --check scripts/contribute-on-stop.mjs && node --check scripts/hook-core.mjs
